  "text": "The Starlark evaluation pipeline for BUILD files in Bazel 8.0.0 involves the following key files and classes:\n\n1. **StarlarkThread** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/StarlarkThread.java`): The core execution thread for Starlark programs. It manages the call stack, thread-local state (via `setThreadLocal`/`getThreadLocal`), mutability, and the profiler. Created via `StarlarkThread.create(mutability, semantics, contextDescription, symbolGenerator)`. Also contains `CallStackEntry` and `CallProfiler` inner types used throughout the build system.\n\n2. **Eval** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Eval.java`): The core Starlark interpreter that executes Starlark ASTs using a `StarlarkThread`.\n\n3. **Starlark** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Starlark.java`): The main entry-point class for invoking Starlark evaluation, including `execFile()` and utility methods.\n\n4. **Module** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Module.java`): Represents a Starlark module (predeclared globals + file-level bindings). Created with `Module.withPredeclared(semantics, predeclared)`.\n\n5. **BazelStarlarkEnvironment** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BazelStarlarkEnvironment.java`): Sets up the predeclared environments for BUILD files, .bzl files, and WORKSPACE files. It is the authoritative source of what symbols are available in each file type (with a few exceptions handled by `PackageFunction` for prelude).\n\n6. **PackageFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/PackageFactory.java`): The primary class that invokes Starlark evaluation for BUILD files. It creates the `StarlarkThread`, sets the `Package.Builder` as a thread-local, configures the module with predeclared symbols from `BazelStarlarkEnvironment`, and calls `Starlark.execFile()`. It also sets a `CallProfiler` and thread-local `RuleDefinitionEnvironment`.\n\n7. **Package** / **Package.Builder** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/Package.java`): `Package` represents a fully loaded Bazel package. `Package.Builder` (inner class) is the mutable accumulator used during BUILD file evaluation to record targets, rules, macros, and other package metadata. It implements `StarlarkThreadContext` and is stored as a thread-local on the `StarlarkThread`.\n\n8. **TargetRecorder** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/TargetRecorder.java`): Tracks targets and macro frames as they are declared during BUILD evaluation. Used by `Package.Builder` to record rule and macro instantiations.\n\n9. **BzlLoadFunction** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/skyframe/BzlLoadFunction.java`): The Skyframe `SkyFunction` responsible for loading `.bzl` files. It compiles Starlark source, creates a `StarlarkThread` with `.bzl` semantics, sets up `BzlInitThreadContext` as a thread-local, executes the module, and caches the result. It supports both normal and inlining evaluation modes.\n\n10. **BzlInitThreadContext** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BzlInitThreadContext.java`): Thread-local context set during `.bzl` file initialization (loading phase), providing the current label, visibility, and other `.bzl`-specific state.\n\n11. **StarlarkRuleClassFunctions** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/analysis/starlark/StarlarkRuleClassFunctions.java`): Implements the `StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi` interface, providing the concrete implementations of `rule()`, `macro()`, `aspect()`, `provider()`, and related builtins that are called from `.bzl` files. The `rule()` call returns a `StarlarkRuleFunction`; the `macro()` call returns a `MacroFunction` (an inner class wrapping a `MacroClass.Builder`).\n\n12. **StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/starlarkbuildapi/StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi.java`): The API interface defining the signatures for `rule()`, `macro()`, `aspect()`, `provider()` etc., annotated with `@GlobalMethods(environment = Environment.BZL)` to register them as BZL-file globals.\n\n13. **MacroClass** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/MacroClass.java`): Analogous to `RuleClass` for symbolic macros. It holds the macro schema and implementation function, and its `expand()` method creates a new `StarlarkThread` to execute the macro's implementation.\n\n14. **RuleClass** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/RuleClass.java`): Describes the schema and configuration for a rule type. Contains `createRule()` that instantiates a `Rule` object into a `Package.Builder`.\n\n15. **RuleFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/RuleFactory.java`): Helper that bridges rule calls during BUILD evaluation to `RuleClass.createRule()`, populating attributes and adding the rule to the package builder.\n\n16. **StarlarkNativeModule** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/StarlarkNativeModule.java`): Implements the `native` object available in `.bzl` files, providing access to BUILD builtins like `glob()`, `existing_rules()`, etc.\n\n17. **BuildGlobals** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BuildGlobals.java`): Provides BUILD-file-specific global functions like `environment_group()`.\n\n18. **PackageFunction** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/skyframe/PackageFunction.java`): The Skyframe `SkyFunction` that orchestrates package loading: it calls `BzlLoadFunction` to load `.bzl` files, then invokes `PackageFactory` to evaluate the BUILD file, and handles globbing dependencies.\n\n19. **WorkspaceFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/WorkspaceFactory.java`): Similar to `PackageFactory` but for WORKSPACE files; also creates `StarlarkThread` instances and evaluates Starlark in the workspace context.\n\n20. **CallStack** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/CallStack.java`): Compact storage of the Starlark call stack at the time a rule is instantiated, used for error reporting."
}

  "text": "The Starlark evaluation pipeline for BUILD files in Bazel 8.0.0 involves the following key files and classes:\n\n**StarlarkThread and environment setup** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/StarlarkThread.java`): The core execution thread for Starlark programs. It manages the call stack, thread-local state (via setThreadLocal/getThreadLocal), mutability, and the profiler. Created via StarlarkThread.create(mutability, semantics, contextDescription, symbolGenerator). Also contains CallStackEntry and CallProfiler inner types. The actual expression/statement evaluator lives in `src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Eval.java`, and `src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Starlark.java` is the entry-point utility class. `src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Module.java` represents a Starlark module's global namespace.\n\n**BazelStarlarkEnvironment** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BazelStarlarkEnvironment.java`): Sets up the predeclared symbol environments for BUILD files, .bzl files, and WORKSPACE files. It is the authoritative source of what symbols are available in each file type.\n\n**PackageFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/PackageFactory.java`): The primary class that invokes Starlark evaluation for BUILD files. It creates the StarlarkThread, sets the Package.Builder as a thread-local (via StarlarkThreadContext), configures the Module with predeclared symbols from BazelStarlarkEnvironment, runs the BUILD file, and sets a CallProfiler. It also sets a thread-local RuleDefinitionEnvironment for rule definition context.\n\n**Package / Package.Builder** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/Package.java`): Package is the immutable result of loading a BUILD file. Package.Builder (inner class) is the mutable accumulator used during BUILD file evaluation. It extends StarlarkThreadContext and is stored as a thread-local on the StarlarkThread. It accumulates targets, rules, macros, and other package-level metadata.\n\n**TargetRecorder** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/TargetRecorder.java`): Tracks targets and macro frames as they are declared during BUILD evaluation, including the MacroFrame inner class which represents the state of a running symbolic macro.\n\n**BzlLoadFunction** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/skyframe/BzlLoadFunction.java`): The Skyframe SkyFunction responsible for loading .bzl files. It compiles Starlark source, creates a StarlarkThread with .bzl semantics, sets BzlInitThreadContext as a thread-local, executes the module, and caches results. Supports both normal and inlining evaluation modes.\n\n**BzlInitThreadContext** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BzlInitThreadContext.java`): Thread-local context set during .bzl file initialization, providing the current label, visibility, and other .bzl-specific state.\n\n**rule() and macro() builtins** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/analysis/starlark/StarlarkRuleClassFunctions.java`): Implements StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi, providing the concrete implementations of rule(), macro(), aspect(), provider(), and related builtins. The rule() call returns a StarlarkRuleFunction; the macro() call returns a MacroFunction (inner class wrapping a MacroClass.Builder). The interface is defined at `src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/starlarkbuildapi/StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi.java`, annotated with @GlobalMethods(environment = Environment.BZL).\n\n**MacroClass** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/MacroClass.java`): Analogous to RuleClass for symbolic macros. Holds the macro schema and implementation function. Its expand() method creates a new StarlarkThread to execute the macro implementation.\n\n**RuleClass / RuleFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/RuleClass.java`, `src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/RuleFactory.java`): RuleClass describes the schema and configuration for a rule type and has createRule() to instantiate Rule objects. RuleFactory bridges rule calls during BUILD evaluation to RuleClass.createRule(), populating attributes and adding the rule to the Package.Builder.\n\n**PackageFunction** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/skyframe/PackageFunction.java`): The Skyframe SkyFunction that orchestrates package loading: calls BzlLoadFunction to load .bzl files, then invokes PackageFactory to evaluate the BUILD file.\n\n**StarlarkNativeModule** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/StarlarkNativeModule.java`): Implements the native object available in .bzl files, providing access to BUILD builtins like glob(), existing_rules(), etc.\n\n**BuildGlobals** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BuildGlobals.java`): Provides BUILD-file-specific global functions such as environment_group().\n\n**PackageCallable** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/PackageCallable.java`): Implements the package() function callable in BUILD files.\n\n**CallStack** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/CallStack.java`): Compact storage of the Starlark call stack at the time a rule is instantiated, used for error reporting.\n\n**WorkspaceFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/WorkspaceFactory.java`): Similar to PackageFactory but for WORKSPACE files; also creates StarlarkThread instances and evaluates Starlark in the workspace context."

  "text": "The Starlark evaluation pipeline for BUILD files in Bazel 8.0.0 involves the following key files and classes:\n\n1. **StarlarkThread** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/StarlarkThread.java`): The core execution thread for Starlark programs. It manages the call stack, thread-local state (via `setThreadLocal`/`getThreadLocal`), mutability, and the profiler. Created via `StarlarkThread.create(mutability, semantics, contextDescription, symbolGenerator)`. Also contains `CallStackEntry` and `CallProfiler` inner types used throughout the build system.\n\n2. **Eval** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Eval.java`): The core Starlark interpreter that executes Starlark ASTs using a `StarlarkThread`.\n\n3. **Starlark** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Starlark.java`): The main entry-point class for invoking Starlark evaluation, including `execFile()` and utility methods.\n\n4. **Module** (`src/main/java/net/starlark/java/eval/Module.java`): Represents a Starlark module (predeclared globals + file-level bindings). Created with `Module.withPredeclared(semantics, predeclared)`.\n\n5. **BazelStarlarkEnvironment** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BazelStarlarkEnvironment.java`): Sets up the predeclared environments for BUILD files, .bzl files, and WORKSPACE files. It is the authoritative source of what symbols are available in each file type (with a few exceptions handled by `PackageFunction` for prelude).\n\n6. **PackageFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/PackageFactory.java`): The primary class that invokes Starlark evaluation for BUILD files. It creates the `StarlarkThread`, sets the `Package.Builder` as a thread-local, configures the module with predeclared symbols from `BazelStarlarkEnvironment`, and calls `Starlark.execFile()`. It also sets a `CallProfiler` and thread-local `RuleDefinitionEnvironment`.\n\n7. **Package** / **Package.Builder** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/Package.java`): `Package` represents a fully loaded Bazel package. `Package.Builder` (inner class) is the mutable accumulator used during BUILD file evaluation to record targets, rules, macros, and other package metadata. It implements `StarlarkThreadContext` and is stored as a thread-local on the `StarlarkThread`.\n\n8. **TargetRecorder** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/TargetRecorder.java`): Tracks targets and macro frames as they are declared during BUILD evaluation. Used by `Package.Builder` to record rule and macro instantiations.\n\n9. **BzlLoadFunction** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/skyframe/BzlLoadFunction.java`): The Skyframe `SkyFunction` responsible for loading `.bzl` files. It compiles Starlark source, creates a `StarlarkThread` with `.bzl` semantics, sets up `BzlInitThreadContext` as a thread-local, executes the module, and caches the result. It supports both normal and inlining evaluation modes.\n\n10. **BzlInitThreadContext** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BzlInitThreadContext.java`): Thread-local context set during `.bzl` file initialization (loading phase), providing the current label, visibility, and other `.bzl`-specific state.\n\n11. **StarlarkRuleClassFunctions** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/analysis/starlark/StarlarkRuleClassFunctions.java`): Implements the `StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi` interface, providing the concrete implementations of `rule()`, `macro()`, `aspect()`, `provider()`, and related builtins that are called from `.bzl` files. The `rule()` call returns a `StarlarkRuleFunction`; the `macro()` call returns a `MacroFunction` (an inner class wrapping a `MacroClass.Builder`).\n\n12. **StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/starlarkbuildapi/StarlarkRuleFunctionsApi.java`): The API interface defining the signatures for `rule()`, `macro()`, `aspect()`, `provider()` etc., annotated with `@GlobalMethods(environment = Environment.BZL)` to register them as BZL-file globals.\n\n13. **MacroClass** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/MacroClass.java`): Analogous to `RuleClass` for symbolic macros. It holds the macro schema and implementation function, and its `expand()` method creates a new `StarlarkThread` to execute the macro's implementation.\n\n14. **RuleClass** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/RuleClass.java`): Describes the schema and configuration for a rule type. Contains `createRule()` that instantiates a `Rule` object into a `Package.Builder`.\n\n15. **RuleFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/RuleFactory.java`): Helper that bridges rule calls during BUILD evaluation to `RuleClass.createRule()`, populating attributes and adding the rule to the package builder.\n\n16. **StarlarkNativeModule** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/StarlarkNativeModule.java`): Implements the `native` object available in `.bzl` files, providing access to BUILD builtins like `glob()`, `existing_rules()`, etc.\n\n17. **BuildGlobals** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/BuildGlobals.java`): Provides BUILD-file-specific global functions like `environment_group()`.\n\n18. **PackageFunction** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/skyframe/PackageFunction.java`): The Skyframe `SkyFunction` that orchestrates package loading: it calls `BzlLoadFunction` to load `.bzl` files, then invokes `PackageFactory` to evaluate the BUILD file, and handles globbing dependencies.\n\n19. **WorkspaceFactory** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/WorkspaceFactory.java`): Similar to `PackageFactory` but for WORKSPACE files; also creates `StarlarkThread` instances and evaluates Starlark in the workspace context.\n\n20. **CallStack** (`src/main/java/com/google/devtools/build/lib/packages/CallStack.java`): Compact storage of the Starlark call stack at the time a rule is instantiated, used for error reporting."
}
